meta.note: Review three-tile model. 01 OPEN=Introduction (identify+place+lead-in). 02 ARGUE=Features (3 building lines). 03 CLOSE=Recommendation. KEY ADDITION over essays: feature signposts carry a join type. signpostJoin:'self' = the signpost completes itself and ends in is/was, so it pairs DIRECTLY with the key (view suppressed). signpostJoin:'open' = a short lead-in that takes a view between signpost and key. The engine reads _join to assemble each feature line cleanly. Support (reason/example/result/compare/contrast) surfaces as the * footnote on Feature tiles. Types are review SUBJECTS.

background: Regarded/Considered as one of the best ...,

When it comes to choosing a ..., the options can be overwhelming.
Few ... have impressed me as much as ...

what really impressed me was that
